tasks.title: Config precedence enforcement
tasks.description: Implement and enforce the configuration precedence hierarchy where CLI args override env vars which override config files. Need to verify the exact precedence chain is implemented correctly across all configuration sources.
test_criteria: CLI arguments take precedence over environment variables
Environment variables take precedence over config file values
Config file values follow the correct precedence chain
tasks.impl_notes: Check existing config module for current precedence implementation and ensure FR-003 precedence rules are strictly followed.

tasks.title: Config ownership boundary (opencode.json vs tui.json)
tasks.description: Define and enforce clear ownership boundaries between opencode.json and tui.json configuration files. Determine which settings belong to which file and prevent cross-contamination.
test_criteria: No overlapping configuration keys between the two files
tasks.impl_notes: Establish clear schema boundaries for each config file type.

tasks.title: Route registration by resource group
tasks.description: Implement server route registration organized by resource groups. Routes should be grouped by their resource type (sessions, messages, agents, etc.) with proper grouping middleware.
test_criteria: Routes are registered under appropriate resource groups
API structure follows RESTful grouping conventions
tasks.impl_notes: Use actix-web scope grouping for resource organization.

tasks.title: Auth enforcement per endpoint
tasks.description: Implement authentication enforcement at the endpoint level. Each API endpoint should verify auth credentials before processing requests.
test_criteria: Valid credentials allow request to proceed
tasks.impl_notes: Use middleware or endpoint guards for auth verification.

tasks.title: Session/message lifecycle CRUD
tasks.description: Implement full CRUD operations for sessions and messages in the server API. Include create, read, update, delete operations with proper validation.
test_criteria: Sessions can be created, read, updated, deleted via API
Messages can be created, read, updated, deleted via API
Proper error handling for invalid operations
tasks.impl_notes: Implement RESTful endpoints with proper status codes.

tasks.title: Exactly one active primary agent invariant
tasks.description: Ensure the agent system maintains the invariant that exactly one primary agent is active at any given time. Implement guards to prevent multiple primary agents from being active simultaneously.
test_criteria: System starts with exactly one primary agent
Cannot activate a second primary agent while one is running
Primary agent deactivation properly transitions to next agent
tasks.impl_notes: Use a state machine or ownership tracking to enforce this invariant.

tasks.title: Subagent execution (child context, result handoff)
tasks.description: Implement subagent execution mechanism where agents can spawn child agents with isolated context and proper result handoff back to parent.
test_criteria: Subagent can be spawned with isolated context
Results are properly handed off to parent agent
Parent context is preserved during subagent execution
tasks.impl_notes: Implement context isolation and result aggregation mechanisms.

tasks.title: Task/delegation mechanism
tasks.description: Implement the task delegation mechanism where primary agents can delegate work to subagents with clear ownership and result tracking.
test_criteria: Tasks can be delegated from primary to subagent
Task progress is tracked and reported
Final results are returned to delegating agent
tasks.impl_notes: Build on subagent execution (P0-2) for task distribution.

tasks.title: Custom tool registration with ToolRegistry
tasks.description: Implement custom tool registration system using ToolRegistry. Tools should be discoverable, registerable, and executable through the registry.
test_criteria: Tools can be registered with unique names
Registered tools can be looked up and executed
tasks.impl_notes: Build on the tool discovery format (P0-5).

tasks.title: Custom tool discovery format (.ts/.js)
tasks.description: Define and implement the custom tool discovery format for .ts and .js files. Tools should be discoverable from specified directories following this format.
test_criteria: Tools in .ts format are discovered correctly
Tools in .js format are discovered correctly
Discovery follows the defined format specification
tasks.impl_notes: Define schema for tool discovery format before implementation.

tasks.title: Plugin hook execution order (HashMap → IndexMap)
tasks.description: Convert plugin hook storage from HashMap to IndexMap to ensure deterministic execution order of plugins.
test_criteria: Plugin hooks execute in deterministic order
Order is consistent across multiple invocations
tasks.impl_notes: Replace HashMap with IndexMap in plugin hook storage.

tasks.title: Plugin-provided tool registration
tasks.description: Allow plugins to provide and register tools through the plugin API. Tools from plugins should be seamlessly integrated into the ToolRegistry.
test_criteria: Plugins can register tools via the plugin API
Tools from plugins appear in ToolRegistry
Plugin tools can be executed normally
tasks.impl_notes: Build on plugin hook order fix (P0-16).

tasks.title: Plugin config separation
tasks.description: Implement proper configuration separation for plugins. Each plugin should have isolated configuration that doesn't leak into other plugins or core config.
test_criteria: Plugin configs are isolated from each other
Plugin configs don't override core config values
Config boundary between opencode.json and plugin configs is clear

tasks.title: TUI plugin `plugin_enabled` semantics
tasks.description: Clarify and implement the `plugin_enabled` configuration semantics for TUI plugins. Determine how this flag controls plugin loading and activation.
tasks.impl_notes: Defined semantics: plugin_enabled belongs in TuiConfig (tui.json), NOT in main Config. When plugin_enabled=false, no plugins are loaded (master switch). When plugin_enabled=true (default), plugins are loaded per their individual PluginConfig.enabled settings.

tasks.title: TUI plugin activate/deactivate
tasks.description: Implement the TUI plugin activate and deactivate lifecycle. Plugins should be able to be enabled and disabled at runtime.
test_criteria: Plugins can be activated at runtime
Plugins can be deactivated at runtime
State is properly managed during activation/deactivation

tasks.title: Local MCP server connection
tasks.description: Implement connection to local MCP servers. Support stdio-based communication with local MCP server processes.
test_criteria: Can connect to local MCP server via stdio
tasks.impl_notes: Use JSON-RPC over stdio for local server communication.

tasks.title: Remote MCP server connection
tasks.description: Implement connection to remote MCP servers over HTTP/SSE. Support bidirectional communication with remote MCP servers.
test_criteria: Can connect to remote MCP server via HTTP
Requests can be sent to remote server
tasks.impl_notes: Build on local MCP connection (P0-6). Added remote_connection test that verifies SSE transport configuration, connection state machine, tools listing, ping, tool calls, and disconnect.

tasks.title: Tool discovery from MCP servers
tasks.description: Implement tool discovery mechanism that queries MCP servers for available tools and integrates them into the local tool registry.
test_criteria: Tools from MCP servers are discovered automatically
Discovered tools can be executed via local registry
tasks.impl_notes: Build on both local (P0-6) and remote (P0-7) connections.

tasks.title: Built-in LSP server detection
tasks.description: Implement detection of built-in/embedded LSP servers. Support automatic detection and launching of language servers bundled with the application.
test_criteria: Built-in LSP servers are detected automatically
Detection works for all bundled language servers
LSP servers are launched with correct configuration
tasks.impl_notes: Define mechanism for bundling and detecting built-in servers.

tasks.title: Diagnostics retrieval from LSP
tasks.description: Implement retrieval and display of diagnostics from LSP servers. Diagnostics should be collected and presented to the user in the TUI.
test_criteria: Diagnostics are received from LSP servers
Diagnostics are properly categorized by severity
Diagnostics are displayed in the TUI

tasks.title: Ownership invariant automated tests
tasks.description: Write comprehensive automated tests for the ownership invariant system. Test all ownership transfer and sharing scenarios.
test_criteria: All ownership transfer scenarios are tested

tasks.title: Stable ID semantics tests
tasks.description: Write automated tests for stable ID semantics. Verify IDs remain stable across snapshots and restores.
test_criteria: IDs are stable across snapshot operations
IDs are stable across restore operations

tasks.title: Snapshot/Revert model tests
tasks.description: Write comprehensive tests for snapshot and revert functionality. Cover all edge cases in the snapshot/revert model.

tasks.title: Hidden vs visible agent behavior
tasks.description: Implement and test the distinction between hidden and visible agents. Hidden agents should not appear in standard UI but still function.
test_criteria: Hidden agents don't appear in standard agent lists

tasks.title: Permission inheritance (parent→subagent)
tasks.description: Implement permission inheritance mechanism where parent agent permissions flow down to subagents. Subagents should not have more permissions than their parent.
test_criteria: Permission checks work at subagent boundaries
tasks.impl_notes: Added AgentPermissionScope enum to permission crate. AgentRuntime tracks permission_scope in RuntimeConfig. invoke_subagent computes effective_scope = parent_scope ∩ subagent_scope. ToolContext passes permission_scope to tools. 6 tests verify inheritance behavior.

tasks.title: MCP tool qualification
tasks.description: Implement proper qualification of MCP tools. Tools from MCP servers should be properly namespaced and qualified to avoid conflicts.
test_criteria: MCP tools are properly qualified with server prefix
Tool name conflicts are handled correctly
tasks.impl_notes: Added server_name field to McpToolAdapter. Tools are now qualified with {server_name}_{tool_name} format. McpRegistry::bridge_to_tool_registry passes server name to adapter. Integration::register_mcp_tools accepts server_name parameter. 5 new tests verify qualification, collision handling, and naming convention.

tasks.title: JSONC parsing
tasks.description: Implement JSONC (JSON with Comments) parsing support for configuration files. Allow comments in JSON config files.
test_criteria: JSONC files with comments are parsed correctly
Invalid JSONC produces clear error messages
tasks.impl_notes: Use a JSONC parsing library (json5) or implement comment stripping. Implementation already existed in crates/core/src/config/jsonc.rs. Added additional tests for invalid JSONC error handling.

tasks.title: Variable expansion
tasks.description: Implement variable expansion in configuration values. Support referencing other config values using ${variable} syntax.
test_criteria: Variables are expanded correctly in config values
Circular references are detected and error reported
tasks.impl_notes: Implement recursive expansion with cycle detection.

tasks.title: `tools` → `permission` alias tests
tasks.description: Write regression tests for the tools→permission configuration alias. Ensure backward compatibility with old config format.
test_criteria: Old 'tools' key works as alias for 'permission'
New 'permission' key takes precedence when both present

tasks.title: Request validation
tasks.description: Implement comprehensive request validation for all server API endpoints. Validate request bodies, parameters, and headers.
test_criteria: Invalid requests return appropriate error codes

tasks.title: Streaming endpoints
tasks.description: Implement streaming responses for appropriate server API endpoints. Support Server-Sent Events for long-running operations.

tasks.title: Custom LSP registration
tasks.description: Implement custom LSP server registration API. Allow external LSP servers to register with the system.
test_criteria: Registered servers are used for language features
tasks.impl_notes: Build on built-in LSP detection (P0-9). Implemented custom.rs module with CustomLspServer, CustomServerConfig, ServerCapabilities, CustomRegistry, and RegisterError. Updated manager.rs to integrate with CustomRegistry.

tasks.title: LSP failure handling
tasks.description: Implement robust failure handling for LSP server operations. Handle server crashes, timeouts, and protocol violations gracefully.
test_criteria: LSP server crashes are detected and handled

tasks.title: Slash commands
tasks.description: Implement slash command functionality in the TUI. Commands like /help, /clear, /exit should be recognized and executed.
test_criteria: Slash commands are recognized when typed

tasks.title: Input model (multiline, history, autocomplete)
tasks.description: Implement enhanced input model with multiline support, command history, and autocomplete functionality.
test_criteria: Command history navigable with up/down arrows

tasks.title: File references (@) fuzzy search
tasks.description: Implement @file reference fuzzy search in the TUI. Typing @ should trigger fuzzy file search.
test_criteria: Search matches files by name fuzzy matching
tasks.impl_notes: Implement fuzzy matching algorithm for file search.

tasks.title: Keybinding system
tasks.description: Implement a configurable keybinding system for the TUI. Users should be able to customize keyboard shortcuts.

tasks.title: Sidebar sections
tasks.description: Implement collapsible sidebar sections in the TUI. Sections should be toggleable and remember their state.
tasks.impl_notes: Implement state persistence for section visibility.

tasks.title: TUI plugin commands API
tasks.description: Implement the TUI plugin commands API. Plugins should be able to register commands that appear in the TUI command palette.
test_criteria: Plugins can register commands via API
Registered commands appear in command palette
Commands execute plugin logic when invoked

tasks.title: TUI plugin routes API
tasks.description: Implement the TUI plugin routes API. Plugins should be able to register custom routes/views in the TUI.
test_criteria: Routes are accessible in the TUI

tasks.title: TUI plugin theme API
tasks.description: Implement the TUI plugin theme API. Plugins should be able to customize colors and styling.

tasks.title: TUI plugin events API
tasks.description: Implement the TUI plugin events API. Plugins should be able to subscribe to and emit TUI events.

tasks.title: TUI plugin state API
tasks.description: Implement the TUI plugin state API. Plugins should be able to store and retrieve persistent state.

tasks.title: TUI plugin onDispose lifecycle
tasks.description: Implement the onDispose lifecycle hook for TUI plugins. Plugins should be able to clean up resources when deactivated.
test_criteria: onDispose is called when plugin is deactivated
Cleanup runs even on unexpected deactivation

tasks.title: Provider abstraction
tasks.description: Implement a provider abstraction layer for LLM backends. Support multiple LLM providers through a common interface.
test_criteria: Provider interface supports all required operations

tasks.title: Default model selection precedence
tasks.description: Implement default model selection with proper precedence. User config should override system defaults.

tasks.title: Per-agent model override
tasks.description: Allow individual agents to override the default model. Each agent should be able to specify its own model.
test_criteria: Agent override takes precedence over provider default
Override is properly passed to provider

tasks.title: Local model providers
tasks.description: Implement support for local model providers (Ollama, LM Studio, etc.). Support local inference endpoints.

tasks.title: Skills compat paths (Claude/Agent-style)
tasks.description: Implement skills compatibility with Claude/Agent-style paths. Support standard skill discovery locations.
test_criteria: Skills are discovered from standard paths

tasks.title: Desktop/web session sharing
tasks.description: Implement session sharing between desktop and web interfaces. Sessions started in one interface should be accessible from another.
test_criteria: Desktop sessions are accessible from web
Web sessions are accessible from desktop

tasks.title: Desktop/web sharing modes
tasks.description: Implement different sharing modes for desktop/web session sharing. Support read-only, collaborative, and controlled access modes.

tasks.title: GitHub workflow triggers
tasks.description: Implement GitHub workflow triggers for CI/CD integration. Support triggering workflows from the application.
test_criteria: Workflows can be triggered via API

tasks.title: Compaction with shareability verification
tasks.description: Implement compaction functionality with shareability verification. Verify that compacted data can still be shared before compaction.

tasks.title: Workspace path validation
tasks.description: Implement workspace path validation. Validate that workspace paths are accessible and properly formatted.
test_criteria: Invalid paths are rejected with clear errors
tasks.impl_notes: Handle edge cases like symlinks and relative paths.

tasks.title: Deterministic collision resolution
tasks.description: Implement deterministic collision resolution for tool names. When multiple tools have the same name, resolve consistently.
test_criteria: Same collision always resolves the same way

tasks.title: Result caching for safe tools
tasks.description: Implement result caching for safe/idempotent tools. Cache tool results to avoid redundant execution.
test_criteria: Safe tools have their results cached

tasks.title: MCP per-server OAuth
tasks.description: Implement per-server OAuth authentication for MCP servers. Support different OAuth configs for different servers.
test_criteria: Different servers can have different OAuth settings

tasks.title: MCP timeout handling
tasks.description: Implement proper timeout handling for MCP server communications. Prevent hanging on unresponsive servers.
test_criteria: Timeouts are enforced for all MCP operations

tasks.title: MCP context cost warnings
tasks.description: Implement context cost tracking and warnings for MCP operations. Warn when operations may exceed context limits.
test_criteria: Warnings are shown before limits are exceeded

tasks.title: Experimental LSP tool
tasks.description: Implement an experimental LSP tool that exposes LSP functionality as a regular tool. Enable LSP features through the tool interface.
test_criteria: LSP functionality is accessible as a tool
Tool can perform basic LSP operations

tasks.title: Config auth/secret storage
tasks.description: Implement secure storage for authentication secrets in configuration. Use OS keychain or similar secure storage.
test_criteria: Secrets are not exposed in config files
Secrets are retrieved securely at runtime

tasks.title: Server API error shape consistency
tasks.description: Ensure consistent error response shape across all server API endpoints. All errors should follow the same format.
test_criteria: All endpoints return consistent error format

tasks.title: Plugin cleanup/unload
tasks.description: Implement proper plugin cleanup and unload functionality. Plugins should be able to be fully unloaded without memory leaks.

tasks.title: Shell prefix (!) handling
tasks.description: Implement shell prefix (!) handling in the TUI. Commands starting with ! should be executed in a shell.
test_criteria: Shell commands are detected by ! prefix
Shell output is captured and displayed

tasks.title: Home view
tasks.description: Implement a home view in the TUI. Display overview information, recent sessions, and quick actions on startup.
tasks.impl_notes: Design clear and informative home view layout.

tasks.title: LLM variant/reasoning budget
tasks.description: Implement LLM variant and reasoning budget configuration. Support different model variants and reasoning effort levels.

tasks.title: Skills permission restrictions
tasks.description: Implement permission restrictions for skills. Skills should only be able to perform actions allowed by their permission scope.
test_criteria: Permission errors are clear and actionable

tasks.title: GitLab CI component
tasks.description: Implement GitLab CI component integration. Support triggering and monitoring GitLab CI pipelines.
tasks.impl_notes: Build after GitHub workflow triggers (FR-016) are complete.

tasks.title: Core ownership tree tests (unit + integration)
tasks.description: Write comprehensive unit and integration tests for the core ownership tree system. Test all ownership relationships and transfer operations.
test_criteria: Unit tests cover all ownership operations
All tests pass with high coverage

tasks.title: Config precedence merge tests
tasks.description: Write tests for configuration precedence merging. Test all precedence levels and their interactions.
test_criteria: Merge behavior is correct at each level

tasks.title: API route-group tests
tasks.description: Write tests for API route grouping functionality. Test that routes are properly grouped and middleware applies correctly.
test_criteria: Group middleware applies to all routes in group

tasks.title: Session/message lifecycle tests
tasks.description: Write tests for session and message lifecycle operations. Test all CRUD operations and edge cases.

tasks.title: Agent primary invariant tests (exactly one active)
tasks.description: Write tests verifying exactly one primary agent is active invariant. Test all ways the invariant could be violated.
test_criteria: Invariant is verified at all state transitions

tasks.title: Subagent execution tests
tasks.description: Write tests for subagent execution. Test context isolation, result handoff, and error propagation.

tasks.title: Tool registry tests
tasks.description: Write comprehensive tests for the ToolRegistry. Test registration, lookup, execution, and lifecycle management.

tasks.title: Plugin hook order tests
tasks.description: Write tests verifying plugin hook execution order. Ensure deterministic ordering with IndexMap.
test_criteria: All hooks are executed in correct order

tasks.title: TUI plugin lifecycle tests
tasks.description: Write tests for TUI plugin lifecycle. Test activation, deactivation, and all lifecycle hooks.
test_criteria: All hooks are called in correct order

tasks.title: MCP integration tests
tasks.description: Write integration tests for MCP server connections. Test local and remote connections, tool discovery, and tool execution.

tasks.title: LSP integration tests
tasks.description: Write integration tests for LSP server functionality. Test server detection, connection, and diagnostics retrieval.

tasks.title: Provider/model tests
tasks.description: Write integration tests for LLM provider and model functionality. Test provider abstraction and model selection.

tasks.title: Skills discovery tests
tasks.description: Write tests for skills discovery functionality. Test discovery from all supported paths and formats.
test_criteria: Skills are discovered from all paths

tasks.title: Desktop/web smoke tests
tasks.description: Write smoke tests for desktop and web interfaces. Test basic functionality and session sharing.
tasks.impl_notes: Build after Phase 4 P0 items are complete.

tasks.title: ACP handshake tests
tasks.description: Write tests for ACP protocol handshake. Test connection establishment, capability negotiation, and error handling.
tasks.impl_notes: Build after ACP transport is available.

tasks.title: GitHub workflow tests
tasks.description: Write tests for GitHub workflow triggers. Test workflow triggering and status monitoring.

tasks.title: GitLab integration tests
tasks.description: Write tests for GitLab CI integration. Test pipeline triggering and monitoring.

tasks.title: tools alias regression suite
tasks.description: Write regression tests for tools→permission alias. Ensure backward compatibility is maintained.
test_criteria: No behavior differences when using alias

tasks.title: Skill path regression suite
tasks.description: Write regression tests for skill path compatibility. Ensure all supported paths work correctly.

tasks.title: Plugin ownership boundary suite
tasks.description: Write regression tests for plugin ownership boundaries. Ensure plugins cannot access each other's configuration.
test_criteria: Plugins cannot read each other's config
Core config is protected from plugins

tasks.title: Performance baselines
tasks.description: Establish performance baselines for all major subsystems. Measure and document performance characteristics.
test_criteria: Baselines are established for all P0 systems
tasks.impl_notes: Build after all P0 items are complete.

tasks.title: Security tests
tasks.description: Write security tests covering authentication, authorization, and data protection.

tasks.title: Recovery tests
tasks.description: Write tests for system recovery scenarios. Test recovery from various failure modes.
test_criteria: Recovery from failure modes is tested

tasks.title: Crash recovery
tasks.description: Write tests for crash recovery. Test that system recovers correctly from crashes.
test_criteria: System state is consistent after recovery
No data loss during crash scenarios

tasks.title: Snapshot/revert durability
tasks.description: Write tests for snapshot and revert durability. Ensure snapshots are durable and revert is reliable.
